narrative:
DOMINANT DRIVERS

1. CHF strength because CSM scores CHF at 100 on D1 and 68 on H4, with USDCHF showing -0.88 correlation to EURUSD confirming broad USD softness despite headline DXY uptick
2. AUD outperformance because H4 CSM places AUD at 100 with AUDJPY printing a strong buy signal at +5 and copper up 2.07% providing direct commodity support
3. USD fundamental bid versus technical weakness because news cites inflation resilience and rising yields as bullish catalysts yet USD CSM sits at 0 on D1 and only 40 on H4, creating the dominant cross-source tension

PRICE CONFIRMS

AUDUSD and NZDUSD are leading the USD soft side with their +0.89 correlation intact and both pairs moving in tandem against a weakening USD proxy reading of -0.58. USDCHF is confirming CHF dominance and its tight -0.88 link to EURUSD means any CHF extension will drag EURUSD higher despite the D1 buy versus H4 sell divergence in that pair. CADJPY and USDJPY correlating at +0.90 confirms that JPY direction is being set entirely by the broader JPY cross bloc rather than any idiosyncratic USD-JPY dynamic.

REGIME

Mixed confirmed with conflicted undertones. VIX at 17.87 is falling which supports risk-on, S&P500 up 0.58% adds to that, but gold at 4699 up 0.46% alongside silver up 3.72% signals simultaneous safe-haven demand, making this a liquidity-driven equity rally rather than a clean risk-on environment.

CONTRADICTIONS

1. USD fundamental versus technical: News scores USD bullish on inflation and yields yet D1 CSM has USD at 0 and the USD proxy is -0.58, price is not following the fundamental narrative
2. NZD fading internally: NZD sits at 78 on D1 CSM but collapses to 16 on H4 CSM while maintaining +0.89 correlation with AUD which is accelerating, creating a divergence that makes NZD an unreliable long despite its longer-frame strength

TRADE IMPLICATIONS

Best: AUDJPY up - AUD CSM at 100 H4, strong buy signal, copper confirming, JPY cross bloc aligned - Conviction 7/10
Secondary: USDCHF down - CHF at 100 D1 CSM, -0.88 EURUSD correlation pulling in same direction, USD technically weak - Conviction 6/10
Avoid: NZDUSD - NZD CSM collapsing on H4 while AUD diverges, internal contradiction unresolved
Watch: Copper holding above 6.60 confirms AUDJPY extension, a break below invalidates the entire AUD-led risk-on thesis

themes.theme: US inflation resilience driving USD strength
US yields rising on inflation expectations
Eurozone economic weakness and growth concerns
Emerging market vulnerability to higher US yields
Asia-Pacific consolidation and loss of momentum
Energy shock implications for monetary policy
Commodity price volatility from supply constraints

key_observation: Hot US PPI data has triggered a significant USD rally and higher bond yields, creating a divergence with weakening Eurozone growth momentum. Emerging markets face dual pressures from USD strength and geopolitical tensions, while commodity markets show mixed signals with energy and agriculture supported by supply concerns.
watch: Upcoming US Retail Sales data, ECB policy signals on rate hikes, Trump-Xi meeting outcomes, geopolitical developments in Iran, and emerging market currency stability amid rising US yields
